name: Chilled Lemon Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together egg yolks and sugar until pale.
2. Add lemon rind to the yolks and mix gently.
3. Gradually add lemon juice while continuing to beat constantly.
4. Soften gelatin in water and heat until it dissolves.
5. Allow the gelatin mixture to cool slightly.
6. Whip cream lightly and stir into the lemon mixture.
7. Add the gelatin to the lemon mixture and continue stirring until the mixture begins to thicken.
8. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
9. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the lemon mixture.
10. Spoon the soufflé batter into a 2-quart souffle dish.
11. Chill several hours or until completely set.
12. To serve, spoon the soufflé onto chilled serving dishes and top with berries.
